title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Best Western India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Best Western India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Best Western India in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Best Western India:
Best Western India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Best Western India!
